calendar.matters:
Amended Petition For Order Authorizing Establishment Of Allan D. Howell Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Jul-14-2014 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun for Petitioner.

Counsel presented oral argument to support his position with regard to the Court granting authority to establish a Trust that is already in existence. The Court denied the petition for order authorizing establishment of trust. Mr. Kun is to prepare the order.

Judge: John Dearman. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Amended Petition For Order Authorizing Establishment Of Allan D. Howell Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Jun-30-2014 Continued To Jul-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Amended Petition For Order Authorizing Establishment Of Allan D. Howell Irrevocable Trust
Off Calendar Jun-02-2014 Continued To Jun-30-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Albert Kun for Alan Howell.

Mr. Kun requested a continuance stating that he attempted to file his response manually, that he was told he had to file it electronically and that he is trying to file it. The Amended Petition for Order Authorizing Establishment of Irrevocable Trust was continued to June 30, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of written response to the Probate Examiner's notes. The matter will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Jones. (Not Reported)
